title: centella lasiophylla
intro: Centella lasiophylla, also known as Gotu Kola, is a plant species belonging to the Apiaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia and Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Centella lasiophylla include improved cognitive function, enhanced skin health, and reduced stress levels, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Centella lasiophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
